headline: The Bull Case For 3M (MMM) Could Change Following A$1.4 Billion Australian PFAS Lawsuit Filing
summary: In late May 2026, the Australian government filed a lawsuit against 3M seeking A$1.40 billion in compensation over PFAS “forever chemicals” used in firefighting foam at defense bases. This case adds a new international dimension to 3M’s existing PFAS exposure, raising fresh questions about the scale and duration of its environmental liabilities. We’ll now examine how this new Australian PFAS lawsuit, and its potential financial and reputational impact, could affect 3M’s investment...
